implemented_scope: raw_source_snapshots preserve official anchor URL, source date, hash, parser version, record mode, raw payload and review status
entity_resolution_candidates preserve candidate name, matched research/entity IDs when available, confidence, method and review status
ingestion_evidence_chain preserves anchor-level evidence context, parser version, review status and counter_evidence array
relationship_fact_candidates preserve a candidate NVIDIA-TSMC-ASML Golden Vertical chain without publishing it as a relationship fact
manual_review_queue creates open publication-review items for single-source relationship candidates
curated discovery anchors are not published as relationship edges
publish_reviewed_relationship_facts.py requires an explicit review decision file before any relationship_fact_candidate can publish

reviewed publication uses deterministic relationship IDs, a transaction, source-threshold override attestation, relationship_evidence copying, data_snapshots, fact_versions, fact_version_evidence and manual_review_queue resolution
reviewed publication can materialize matched research universe endpoints as research_target legal_entity rows and backfill entity_resolution_candidates, while unresolved endpoints still fail closed
tests/fixtures/golden_vertical_review_decisions.json is fixture-only and explicitly not production legal or data clearance

publish_reviewed_relationship_facts.py now separates fixture review from production owner sign-off: fixture review requires --allow-fixture-review, production owner sign-off requires --allow-production-owner-signoff, and unsigned owner decisions fail closed

production owner sign-off decisions persist review_context, owner_actor, owner_role, authority_scope and owner_signature_hash into data_snapshots metadata, relationship qualifiers, relationship_evidence and fact_version payloads
subsequent curated_ingestion_refresh runs preserve published candidates and resolved review queues instead of demoting them back to candidate/open
validation_commands: PYTHONPATH=scripts:. .venv/bin/python -c 'from migrate import discover_migrations; print([(m.version, m.name) for m in discover_migrations()])'
